'''Ijol''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] with twenty-four [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was fourth in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] around the [[Tirahnn (star)|Tirahnn]] [[Star/Legends|sun]]. Ijol resided in the [[Tirahnn system/Legends|Tirahnn system]] of the [[Zeemacht Cluster/Legends|Zeemacht Cluster]]<ref name="TT" /> in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="TEA" /> The Tirahnn [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Ijol, lay along the [[Perlemian Trade Route]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]]. By [[17,000 BBY]], Ijol's system also resided along a [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] route that ceased to exist by [[3976 BBY]].<ref name="DeadRoute">Per ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'', by approximately [[17,000 BBY]] the [[Tirahnn system/Legends|Tirahnn system]], and therefore Ijol, was on a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] that ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' shows linked it to the [[Filordis system/Legends|Filordis]] and [[Ktil system/Legends|Ktil systems]]. Per ''The Essential Atlas'', that route had ceased to exist by [[3976 BBY]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Ijol was introduced in "[[Triplet Threat]]," a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] mini-adventure written by [[Jason Fry]] for use with [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' and published on [[Wizards.com]] on [[January 22]], [[2004]].<ref name="TT" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Tirahnn [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Ijol, in grid square N-8.<ref name="TEA" />
